title: Bam Ui Pati
description: A pop star’s life becomes entangled with a mysterious visitor when she falls ill with a vampire’s body bone curse.
quote: According to her charts, her body bone may indeed be cursed.
parent: Star vs. the Forces of Evil
alt1: singer in a hospital bed while two fans cry
alt2: fans run after the singer down the hospital hallway, one guy is carrying a pizza
alt3: vampire stands behind a billowing sheer curtain
alt4: vampire puts his hand on the pop stars face
